name: csat-trend
prompt: Show CSAT score over the last 90 days.

name: nps-by-segment
prompt: Compare NPS across customer segments for the last quarter.

name: ces-by-channel
prompt: Customer effort score broken down by support channel for this month.

name: response-volume-region
prompt: Total survey responses by region this year.

name: sentiment-product-area
prompt: Sentiment distribution by product area over the last 30 days.

name: completion-rate-language
prompt: Survey completion rate by language, sorted by volume.

name: abandonment-stage
prompt: Where users abandon the onboarding survey, broken down by question.

name: csat-vs-tenure
prompt: CSAT score against customer tenure in buckets of 0-6, 6-12, 12-24, 24+ months.

name: ticket-volume-day-of-week
prompt: Support feedback volume by day of week to find peak load days.

name: feature-vote-stacked
prompt: Top voted feature requests across plan tiers, as a stacked bar chart.

name: agent-satisfaction-heatmap
prompt: Support agent satisfaction scores per agent, grouped by team, last quarter.

name: trend-multi-metric
prompt: Plot CSAT, NPS, and CES on the same time series over the last 6 months so we can compare trajectories.
